channel.title: Podcast 監察 Podcast Monitor
channel.description: 精選財經及科技 Podcast 最新集數，自動監察更新

item.title: Hank Paulson on Iran War, Energy Market Disruptions, Copper Supply Strain, US Tax Debate — Wall Street Week
item.author: Wall Street Week
item.description:
Wall Street Week

前美國財政部長保爾森警告伊朗戰爭可能衝擊全球能源市場；銅供應短缺凸顯美國生產缺口；美國稅制公平性引發辯論。

This week, Former US Treasury Secretary Hank Paulson warns the biggest economic risk from the war in Iran may come from global shocks spilling into US markets.  Plus, how rising demand for copper is outpacing supply, exposing gaps in US production and increasing reliance on imports. Later, are the wealthiest Americans paying their fair share, or does the tax system allow too much income to go untaxed? See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Duration: 48:00

#Hank Paulson #伊朗戰爭 #能源市場 #銅供應 #美國稅制 #經濟風險 #進口依賴

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz Is Open. Now What? — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

伊朗宣佈在黎巴嫩停火期間開放荷莫茲海峽，惟要求船隻使用其指定航線，引發國際油價和地緣政治局勢變化。

The Strait of Hormuz is now open. In a social media post Friday morning, Iran’s Foreign Minister wrote that Iran will be letting ships through the vital waterway for the duration of a 10-day ceasefire in Lebanon. Oil prices fell, and President Trump celebrated. But Iran’s announcement came with a big caveat: Travel must use a “coordinated route,” specified by Iran. On today’s Big Take, host David Gura and Bloomberg’s Middle East breaking news editor, Patrick Sykes, talk through Iran’s dramatic r...

Duration: 15:46

#荷莫茲海峽 #伊朗 #停火 #黎巴嫩 #油價 #特朗普 #海上運輸

item.title: Hour of Slurping — Money Stuff: The Podcast
item.author: Money Stuff: The Podcast
item.description:
Money Stuff: The Podcast

節目討論涵蓋天氣、AI技術、區塊鏈、可轉換債券融資等多個話題，並涉及商品期貨、銀行抵押品等金融議題。

Katie and Matt discuss the weather, NewBird AI, Long Blockchain, floating-strike convertible financing, meme AI diversification, dot AI, the meme ETF, public listing option value, shareholder voting, Exxon’s grudges, comptroller trolling, the horrifying sounds of coffee grading, spot vs. futures commodity quality and banks foreclosing on shrimp to eat it. See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Duration: 34:07

#天氣 #AI #區塊鏈 #可轉換債券 #商品期貨 #銀行 #融資 #上市

item.title: A.I. Backlash Turns Violent + Kara Swisher on Healthmaxxing + The Zuck Bot Is Coming — Hard Fork
item.author: Hard Fork
item.description:
Hard Fork

節目探討人工智能反彈運動趨勢加劇，涉及健康優化風潮及Meta創辦人的AI機器人計劃。

Is anti-A.I. radicalization a growing trend?

Duration: 1:03:21 · Ep. 190

#人工智能 #反彈運動 #暴力 #Kara Swisher #健康優化 #Zuck Bot #Meta

item.title: Planet Money Turned Everyday Annoyances Into an Economics Book — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

Planet Money播客主持人將日常生活中的煩惱轉化為經濟學教材，探討食物、住房、約會應用等問題背後的經濟現象和市場結構。

There are a lot of things to be annoyed about in modern life. The high cost of food and housing and childcare. Dating apps that don't seem to work. The fear of AI replacing you at your job. These are all common complaints and concerns, and each of them can be traced to a specific economic phenomenon or market structure issue. Once you start thinking about the world in this way, you can't unsee it. In this episode, we speak with Planet Money co-host Mary Childs, and contributor to the podcast, Al...

Duration: 39:01

#Planet Money #Mary Childs #Alex Mayassi #經濟學 #市場結構 #日常煩惱 #經濟現象

item.title: Fed chair, health care, and AI shoe repair — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

本周經濟指標關注聯邦主席提名人的財富爭議、鞋履公司Allbirds轉型AI業務，以及平價醫療法案參保人數下降。

It’s Indicators of the Week. Our weekly look at some of the most fascinating economic numbers from the news. On today’s episode: the drama behind the Fed Chair nominee’s wealth; the shoe company Allbirds is becoming an AI firm; and a drop in how many people are paying for their Affordable Care Act plans. The Indicator is launching a newsletter! Be among the first and sign-up now: npr.org/indicatornewsletter Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com...

Duration: 9:25

#聯邦主席 #醫療保健 #人工智能 #Allbirds #平價醫療法案

item.title: Will the energy shock change global trade imbalances? With Brad Setser — The Economics Show
item.author: The Economics Show
item.description:
The Economics Show

中國龐大貿易順差引發貿易夥伴不滿，能源衝擊能否重新平衡全球貿易失衡。

China runs an enormous trade surplus, much to the chagrin of some of its trading partners: cheap exports of cars, chemicals and other goods are hampering major economies, especially in Europe. But the Asian nation, the world’s largest exporter, is a net importer of oil. Could higher oil prices help redress global trade imbalances? Soumaya Keynes speaks to Brad Setser, senior fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, to discuss how global trade imbalances have changed, why Beijing’s surplus may...

Duration: 33:56

#能源衝擊 #全球貿易失衡 #中國 #貿易順差 #Brad Setser #油價 #歐洲

item.title: Instant Reaction: Netflix Misses, Reed Hastings Steps Down — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

Netflix第二季業績預測不達預期導致股價下跌，創辦人兼主席Reed Hastings宣布卸任董事會，專注慈善事業。

Netflix gave a forecast for the second quarter that fell short of analysts expectations, sending the shares down in extended trading. The streaming pioneer also announced that chairman and co-founder Reed Hastings is stepping down from the board after 29 years to pursue philanthropy and personal interests. Revenue rose 16% in the first three months of the year to $12.3 billion, compared with estimates for $12.2 billion, the company said in a statement on Thursday. Earnings per share for the quar...

Duration: 20:00

#Netflix #Reed Hastings #股價下跌 #第二季預測 #業績不達預期 #董事會 #慈善事業

item.title: Iran and Global Debt Cloud IMF-World Bank Meetings — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

國際貨幣基金組織與世界銀行春季會議氣氛沉重，全球央行官員面對伊朗戰爭、人工智能及債務激增等經濟衝擊，討論IMF下調的全球增長預測及政府應對下次經濟危機的能力。

The atmosphere was grim at this week’s IMF and World Bank spring meetings, as global central bankers grappled with economic shocks from the war in Iran, AI and mounting debt. On today’s Big Take podcast, host David Gura sits down with Stephanie Flanders — Bloomberg’s head of Economics and Politics and host of Trumponomics — and senior economic writer Shawn Donnan to discuss the IMF’s revised global growth forecast and whether governments are equipped to contain the next economic crisis. Read mor...

Duration: 19:29

#伊朗 #IMF #世界銀行 #全球債務 #經濟增長 #央行 #經濟危機 #人工智能

item.title: Boing! Springtime for the markets — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

市場迎來春天，標普500創新高，運動鞋公司Allbirds轉向人工智能業務，股價飆升774%，投資者熱情高漲。

After a nervous couple of months, markets suddenly roared to life this week, with the S&P 500 reaching a new high. Struggling shoe company Allbirds led the charge with a pivot to AI and saw its stock leap 774 per cent. Today on the show, Katie Martin and Rob Armstrong try to figure out why investors are so excited. Also they go long kebabs and the Strait of Vermouth. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Ka...

Duration: 21:28

#市場 #標普500 #Allbirds #人工智能 #股價 #投資者

item.title: PepsiCo’s Snacks Business Starts to Rebound After Price Cuts — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

百事公司透過削價策略見效，旗下鹹味零食業務開始反彈增長。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu - Ken Shea, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Consumer Products Analyst, to recap PepsiCo earnings. PepsiCo Inc. said it’s starting to see salty snack sales grow after the company cut prices earlier this year. The maker of Doritos and Lay’s said its strategy of slashing prices by up to 15% in some brands and reducing internal costs through layoffs and plant closures ...

Duration: 24:08

#PepsiCo #零食業務 #降價 #多力多滋 #樂事 #北美食品部門 #有機收入增長

item.title: Brad Setser on the War in Iran and the Future of the US Dollar — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

伊朗戰爭可能重塑全球金融格局，引發對美元主導國際金融秩序的疑問。

It's possible that the war in Iran could reshape financial flows in significant ways. Perhaps the Gulf states will end up as less desirable places to do business. Perhaps Iran will have a tollbooth at the Strait of Hormuz. Perhaps this episode will accelerate the world's shift away from oil. It's impossible to say. But given the uncertainty, fresh questions are being raised about the existing financial world order, upon the top of which the US dollar sits. On this episode, we speak once again wi...

Duration: 51:59

#伊朗戰爭 #美元 #金融秩序 #Brad Setser #波斯灣 #荷莫茲海峽 #石油 #美國外交關係委員會

item.title: Fixing the oil crisis might not fix the Persian Gulf — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

霍爾木茲海峽重新開放可能無法單獨解決波斯灣經濟危機，該地區面臨油價暴跌、旅遊業萎靡及房產市場風險等多重經濟挑戰。

If the Strait of Hormuz completely reopens, it still might not be enough to restart the economies in the Persian Gulf. Many countries there have been hammered by the oil crisis. And although allowing ships through would stanch the immediate bloodletting in the energy sector, other sectors might not spring back so quickly. Tourists are visiting less. Property markets are at risk. On today’s show, we survey the economic damage to countries in the Gulf. And try to get a sense of the long-term econo...

Duration: 8:58

#油危機 #波斯灣 #霍爾木茲海峽 #經濟 #能源 #旅遊業 #房產市場

item.title: The Winners and Losers of Trump’s Tax Policy — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普稅收政策帶來美國稅制重大改革，包括小費和加班費減稅、提高州稅扣除額等措施，但民眾在報稅日的實際感受與預期存在差距。

President Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill Act brought about a host of changes to US tax policy, from tax breaks on tips and overtime to an increased cap on state and local tax deductions, also known as SALT. But are Americans feeling the shifts on tax day? On today’s Big Take podcast, host David Gura and Bloomberg reporter Ben Steverman dig into how the president’s second-term tax provisions are playing out, and what a lower-than-expected increase on the average return could mean for the Republic...

Duration: 15:25

#特朗普 #稅收政策 #稅務改革 #州稅扣除額 #美國 #報稅 #中期選舉

item.title: Anthropic Draws Investor Offers at Over $800 Billion Value — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

人工智能初創公司Anthropic獲投資者超過8000億美元估值的融資意向，較今年2月的估值大幅上升。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu -Mandeep Singh, Global Tech Research Head at Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses Anthropic. Anthropic PBC has received offers from investors for a new round of funding that could value the company at about $800 billion or higher. The offers would more than double the $350 billion pre-money valuation Anthropic attached to its $30 billion fundraising in February. Ant...

Duration: 21:03

#Anthropic #融資 #估值 #投資者 #人工智能 #初創公司

item.title: Introducing: The Story of Money — Behind the Money
item.author: Behind the Money
item.description:
Behind the Money

由《金融時報》專欄作家及編輯主持的新播客系列，透過歷史視角探討塑造全球金融體系的人物、思想與機構。

The economist John Kenneth Galbraith once quipped that “there can be few fields of human endeavour in which history counts for so little as in the world of finance.” This show sets out to prove the opposite. Each week, FT columnist Gillian Tett and FT Alphaville editor Robin Wigglesworth dig into the ideas, personalities and institutions that have shaped global finance. From unregulated banking in 19th-century frontier America to institutionalised debt jubilees in ancient Mesopotamia, and from t...

Duration: 1:17

#金錢故事 #金融歷史 #全球金融 #《金融時報》 #經濟學 #銀行系統 #市場

item.title: War in Iran Is Already Reshaping East Asia's Energy Future — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

伊朗戰爭推高全球商品價格，東亞作為波斯灣油氣主要進口地受衝擊最大，正在改變該區域能源未來格局。

The war in Iran has caused the price of all kinds of commodities to surge, and that has a negative economic impact almost everywhere. But the squeeze is really being felt hard in East Asia, which is the ultimate destination for a lot of oil and gas that come out of the Gulf. And though the Strait of Hormuz may eventually re-open, and the acute pain may pass, this episode may already be reshaping the future. On this episode of the podcast we speak with Alex Turnbull, an investor based in Singapor...

Duration: 37:23

#伊朗戰爭 #東亞 #能源 #油氣 #霍爾木茲海峽 #商品價格 #波斯灣

item.title: Think the oil shock is bad in the US? Look here — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

荷美茲海峽油運中斷引發全球油價飆升，各國應對策略各異；節目分析紐西蘭、津巴布韋及中國三國如何應對油價危機。

Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz is pretty slow right now. A once steady stream of global oil has been severed, and oil prices have shot into the stratosphere. Countries across the world are trying to stop the bleeding. One is counting down the days until it runs out of oil. Another is … just fine. On today’s show, we take stock of how three countries, New Zealand, Zimbabwe, and China, are navigating the oil crisis. The Indicator is launching a newsletter! The very first email goes out this...

Duration: 10:09

#荷美茲海峽 #石油危機 #油價 #紐西蘭 #津巴布韋 #中國 #全球供應

item.title: How to get through the Strait of Hormuz — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

美國與伊朗衝突升級，伊朗控制荷莫茲海峽關鍵航道，透過襲擊船隻和製造安全威脅來施加經濟槓桿，成為全球經濟咽喉。

The United States has been at war with Iran since February 28th. And for a month and a half, Iran’s main leverage over the U.S. has been their control over the Strait of Hormuz — a key global shipping route. Iran has attacked ships that try to pass without approval. And recently they’ve insinuated that one part of the Strait — the part near Oman — is not safe. Which means that captains had to go right by Iran’s shores to get through the Strait … effectively creating a chokepoint for the global e...

Duration: 18:53

#荷莫茲海峽 #伊朗 #美國 #船隻襲擊 #全球航運 #經濟槓桿 #阿曼

item.title: Trump’s Plan to Open the Strait of Hormuz? Close It — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

美國計劃對霍爾木茲海峽實施海上封鎖以向伊朗施壓，尋求突破核協議談判僵局。

The ceasefire between the US and Iran is set to expire next week and the US is trying a different tactic to pressure Iran into a deal: a naval blockade. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg Economics defense lead Becca Wasser and Bloomberg Middle East Breaking News editor Patrick Sykes join Sarah Holder to break down how the US’s naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz works, what could happen if it’s tested and how this latest pressure move could influence another round of Iran-US peace talks....

Duration: 16:54

#特朗普 #霍爾木茲海峽 #美國 #伊朗 #海上封鎖 #核協議談判 #中東局勢

item.title: Space ecstasy — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

馬斯克旗下SpaceX計劃今年上市，可能成為有史以來最大規模首次公開募股，節目探討其獨特之處。

Elon Musk’s SpaceX plans to go public this year in what may be the largest IPO of all time. But what is SpaceX, exactly? Today on the show, Katie Martin and Rob Armstrong speak with the FT’s west coast editor Richard Waters about the SpaceX listing and why it isn’t like any other IPO. Also, they go long papal news, southern California and magnolia trees. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Katie Martin at...

Duration: 23:42

#Elon Musk #SpaceX #上市 #IPO #馬斯克

item.title: Presenting What Next TBD: Why Everyone is Freaking out About Private Credit — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

節目探討私人信貸（影子銀行）快速增長帶來的風險，包括其與AI泡沫的關聯、對退休投資組合的威脅，以及在缺乏銀行監管下可能引發的金融危機隱患。

It's fueling the A.I. bubble, it's coming to your retirement portfolio—and it's flashing a lot of warning signs right now. In the wake of the 2008 financial crisis, private credit or “shadow banking” grew as an alternative to the regulations and shared risk that institutional banks operate within. What happens if a crisis hits the trillions of dollars that are outside of those guardrails? We may be about to find out. Guest: Tracy Alloway , co-host of Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast. https://slate.c...

Duration: 37:23

#私人信貸 #影子銀行 #金融危機 #AI泡沫 #退休投資 #2008金融危機 #金融監管 #What Next TBD

item.title: Amazon to Buy Satellite Operator Globalstar for $90 a Share — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

亞馬遜以約116億美元收購衛星運營商Globalstar，每股90美元，以擴展其衛星系統服務。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu - Michelle Davis, Bloomberg News Senior Deals Reporter, discusses Amazon.com agreeing to acquire satellite operator Globalstar in a roughly $11.6 billion deal to expand the services of its satellite system. -- Sid Philip, Bloomberg Chief Correspondent for Global Aviation, discusses United Airlines Chief Executive Officer Scott Kirby floating a possible combinatio...

Duration: 24:01

#Amazon #Globalstar #衛星運營商 #收購 #90美元 #11.6億美元

item.title: How the workplace helps you win Survivor — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

三位《Survivor》前冠軍分享職場技能如何助他們在真人秀中勝出，涉及博弈論、社交工程等策略。

With the 50th season of Survivor underway, three former Survivor winners tell us how some of the skills they learned in their careers helped them win the show. There’s game theory, social engineering, and learning how to get along with a group of castaways who have a $1 million incentive to vote you off the island. Come see Planet Money live on stage! Twelve cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com/#tour Related episodes: Teamwork actually does make the dream work The game theory that l...

Duration: 8:24

#Survivor #職場 #冠軍 #博弈論 #社交工程 #策略 #真人秀 #團隊合作

item.title: What Orbán’s Loss Means for Hungary, Russia and Trump — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

匈牙利總理歐爾班在國會選舉中遭逆轉敗北，新興政黨領導人馬扎爾承諾終結貪腐和「非自由民主」制度，將重塑匈牙利與歐盟和俄羅斯的關係。

Hungarians handed Prime Minister Viktor Orbán a resounding defeat in Sunday’s parliamentary elections. Peter Magyar and his upstart Tisza won the election by a landslide on the promise of ending years of corruption and the ‘illiberal democracy’ that became synonymous with Orbán’s tenure. On today’s Big Take podcast, former US Ambassador David Pressman sits down with Sarah Holder to discuss what Orbán’s loss means for Hungary’s economy and political institutions, how a new leader could reshape it...

Duration: 18:12

#歐爾班 #匈牙利 #國會選舉 #馬扎爾 #俄羅斯 #歐盟 #川普

item.title: Ackman Starts Marketing Pershing IPO to Raise up to $10 Billion — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

艾克曼啟動Pershing廣場IPO上市推介，目標募集最多100億美元。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu ***Broadcasting Live from the New Jersey Institute of Technology*** - - Bailey Lipschultz, Bloomberg News Senior Equities Reporter, discusses Bill Ackman kicking off formal marketing for the US initial public offering of his closed-end fund and his hedge fund. The IPO for Pershing Square USA Ltd. is expected to price on April 28, and could raise as much as $10 bi...

Duration: 17:56

#艾克曼 #Pershing #IPO #募集資金 #閉端基金 #對沖基金 #美國

item.title: Ziad Daoud Explains How War with Iran Will Reshape the Gulf — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

伊朗戰爭將深刻重塑波斯灣地區的地緣政治和經濟格局，涉及基礎設施重建、防務開支增加及經濟轉型。

Regardless of whether the war with Iran continues, it seems likely to have a lasting impact on the Gulf states. They may have to rebuild damaged pipelines and other infrastructure, or create new ones that bypass the Strait of Hormuz. They might have to spend more money on their own defense, or intensify a push to diversify their economies away from oil. New political alliances may be formed, and old ones could fall apart. In this episode, we bring back Ziad Daoud, chief emerging markets economis...

Duration: 45:15

#伊朗 #波斯灣 #戰爭 #Ziad Daoud #中東 #地緣政治 #經濟影響 #油氣

item.title: Can you really do what you love? — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

節目探討在現代社會中追求熱情工作是否可行，訪問科技投資者和經濟學家分享如何將興趣轉化為職業成功的要素。

They say do what you love and you’ll never work a day in your life. But c’mon. Is that possible in this day and age? On today’s show, we speak to a tech investor who tells us the ingredients he believes are needed to make passion pay. And we hear from an economist who’s run the numbers on luck. Bill Gurley’s book is Runnin’ Down a Dream: How to Thrive in a Career You Actually Love . Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com/#tour Related episodes: ...

Duration: 9:50

#熱情工作 #職業發展 #科技投資者 #經濟學 #夢想 #成功要素 #工作生活

item.title: The Big Macro Force That's Been Driving Stocks Higher for Years — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

探討多年來推高股票市場的主要宏觀經濟力量，分析企業盈利增長與股票估值上升的原因。

Stocks have gone up over the years because corporate earnings continue to grow. That part is straightforward. But in addition to rising stock prices, we've also seen rising stock market valuations. For years, investors have talked about stocks being unreasonably priced, and yet they haven't reverted to historical norms. But perhaps there's a good explanation for this, beyond just animal spirits. Jonathan Heathcote is an economist at the Minneapolis Federal Reserve Bank, who recently co-authored ...

Duration: 36:08

#股票 #宏觀經濟 #企業盈利 #股票估值 #聯邦儲備銀行 #股票市場 #投資者

item.title: BOOKstore Economics — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

探討書店如何選擇上架圖書，以及此決定對讀者閱讀習慣的影響；書店貨架是競爭激烈的商業資源，每本新書能否上架涉及複雜的市場決策。

How do bookstores choose the books they stock, and how does that affect what customers read? It may not seem like it, but every shelf in a bookstore is a highly valuable and contested piece of commercial real estate. And for every new book that a bookstore decides to stock, there are thousands of others that did not make the cut. So how do bookstores make those decisions? And how will the Planet Money book fare under the discerning eyes of the booksellers, the final gatekeepers in the long gaunt...

Duration: 40:52

#書店 #經濟學 #圖書出版 #貨架 #商業決策 #Planet Money #出版產業

item.title: Haass on the War in Iran, Iran Oil Fallout, IMF Meeting Anxiety, US-China Rare Earth Competition — Wall Street Week
item.author: Wall Street Week
item.description:
Wall Street Week

探討美伊和談前景、伊朗衝突對油價及經濟的影響，以及中美在稀土礦產競爭中的對峙。

This week, Richard Haass of Centerview Partners on what to expect out of US-Iran peace talks.  Plus, why Gulf states are begging Trump not to end the Iran war early and how the conflict could hit consumers, from gas prices to interest rates. And, former Canadian Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland warns of stagflation, a food crisis, and the growing strain on the US-led global order as finance leaders gather in Washington at the annual World Bank-IMF meetings. Later, how China quietly built a mon...

Duration: 48:08

#伊朗戰爭 #美伊和談 #油價 #IMF會議 #美中競爭 #稀土 #經濟衰退

item.title: It’s Not Just Oil. War in Iran Will Hike the Price of Nearly Everything You Buy — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

伊朗戰爭導致荷莫茲海峽關閉，全球油價飆升並威脅食品、塑膠、半導體等多種商品供應。

A core US demand heading into peace talks with Iran this weekend will be reopening the Strait of Hormuz, where a near-total shipping shutdown has led to rising global oil prices and threatened supplies of food, plastics, packaging and semiconductors. On today’s Big Take podcast, Sarah Holder speaks with Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal, hosts of Bloomberg’s Odd Lots podcast, about how the Hormuz shutdown is reverberating around commodities markets — and the lasting mark it could leave on the glo...

Duration: 20:57

#伊朗 #荷莫茲海峽 #油價 #戰爭 #供應鏈 #商品價格 #海運

item.title: Anthropic Model Scare Sparks Bessent, Powell Warning to Bank CEOs — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

美國財政部長貝森特及聯邦準備委員會主席鮑威爾因Anthropic最新AI模型引發網絡風險憂慮，緊急召集華爾街銀行行政人員召開會議。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Alexandra Semenova -Katherine Chiglinsky, Bloomberg US Finance Team Leader, discusses Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Fed Chair Jay Powell summoning Wall Street leaders to an urgent meeting on concerns that the latest AI model from Anthropic PBC will usher in an era of greater cyber risk. - Poonam Goyal, Senior U.S. E-Commerce and Retail Analyst at Bloomberg Intelligen...

Duration: 19:28

#Anthropic #貝森特 #鮑威爾 #AI模型 #網絡風險 #銀行CEO #華爾街 #財政部

item.title: Humiliation Ritual — Money Stuff: The Podcast
item.author: Money Stuff: The Podcast
item.description:
Money Stuff: The Podcast

節目討論多個金融及科技話題，包括Satoshi Nakamoto身份、Bill Ackman動向、Universal Music Group、SpaceX IPO等，並涉及衍生工具交易及基金管理等議題。

Katie and Matt discuss Satoshi Nakamoto, spotting liars, Katie being a witch, Bill Ackman doing stuff, Universal Music Group, SPARCs, asymmetric derivatives trades, Matt’s dream money management career, doomsday funds, Elon Musk’s big thing, the SpaceX IPO, Grok for bankers, humiliating IPO pitches and some ETF stuff for the ETF fans. See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Duration: 30:53

#Satoshi Nakamoto #Bill Ackman #Universal Music Group #SpaceX IPO #衍生工具交易 #Elon Musk #Grok #ETF

item.title: Anthropic’s Cybersecurity Shock Wave + Ronan Farrow and Andrew Marantz on Their Sam Altman Investigation + One Good Thing — Hard Fork
item.author: Hard Fork
item.description:
Hard Fork

Anthropic新型AI模型發現數千個軟件漏洞引發網絡安全震蕩；Ronan Farrow和Andrew Marantz公開調查Sam Altman的相關發現。

The new Anthropic model that’s too dangerous to be released is already revealing thousands of software vulnerabilities.

Duration: 1:04:06 · Ep. 189

#Anthropic #網絡安全 #Sam Altman #Ronan Farrow #Andrew Marantz #AI模型 #軟件漏洞 #調查

item.title: How Shipping Insurance Really Works During a War — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

探討戰爭期間海運保險的運作機制，以伊朗衝突導致荷莫茲海峽保險費用飆升為案例，分析保險對海上貿易的關鍵作用。

When the conflict with Iran started, some of the first headlines we saw had to do with shipping insurance. Marine insurers were said to be canceling war risk coverage for vessels going through the Strait of Hormuz. Premiums were said to surge. Meanwhile, the Trump administration announced it would offer its own insurance for ships traversing the Persian Gulf, in an effort to get things moving again. So why is insurance such a crucial part of maritime trade? And how does the system actually work?...

Duration: 53:18

#海運保險 #戰爭風險 #荷莫茲海峽 #伊朗衝突 #保費 #海上貿易 #美國政府

item.title: Class myths, an influx of e-ships, and pricey Olympics tix! — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

本集節目透過數據分析探討中產階級衰退迷思、電動船舶發展前景及洛杉磯奧運門票高價等當周重點議題。

It’s Indicators of the Week, our weekly look at some of the most fascinating numbers from the news. (Now on YouTube !) On today’s episode: Is the middle class actually hollowing out ? Are more e-ships powered by batteries on the horizon? And how much are the first batch of L.A. Olympics tickets going for??? Related episodes: Why the Olympics cost so much The Indicator Takes On Batteries Are the Simpsons still middle class? For sponsor-free episodes of The Indicator from Planet Money, subscribe t...

Duration: 9:29

#中產階級 #電動船舶 #奧運門票 #洛杉磯奧運 #經濟指標

item.title: One Small Step for NASA, One Giant Leap for the Lunar Economy — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

NASA阿爾忒彌斯二號任務創造載人航天紀錄，象徵月球經濟時代的來臨。

Need a little ‘moon joy’? Over the past eight days, four astronauts on NASA's Artemis II mission have been flying through the cosmos, breaking records for human spaceflight and sharing never-before-seen images from the dark side of the moon. On today’s Big Take podcast, guest host Stacey Vanek Smith and Bloomberg global space reporter Loren Grush talk about what the mission means for the future of galactic exploration and the burgeoning “lunar economy.” Read more: NASA’s Breathtaking Photos From...

Duration: 18:51

#NASA #阿爾忒彌斯二號 #月球 #太空探索 #月球經濟 #宇航員 #登月

item.title: What has changed? — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

特朗普政府在伊朗局勢上的政策趨向緩和，市場應聲上升，但分析認為市場結構已發生深層變化，難以回到疫情前狀態。

As President Donald Trump’s confusing messages on the Iran war seem to coalesce around a retreat, markets have risen. But are we really going back to anything like what we had before February 28? Today on the show, Katie Martin and Rob Armstrong try to understand the meaningful changes that will persist. Also, they go long bank earnings and short "maxing" anything. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Kati...

Duration: 20:54

#特朗普 #伊朗 #市場 #銀行業績 #政策變化 #地緣政治 #金融市場

item.title: DOJ Opens Probe Into NFL’s Sports TV Deals — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

美國司法部對NFL體育電視轉播交易展開調查，涉及反競爭行為推高消費者觀看成本的指控。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Isabelle Lee -Randall Williams, Bloomberg Business of Sports Reporter, discusses news that the US Justice Department has opened an investigation into whether the National Football League is engaging in anticompetitive tactics that drive up the cost for consumers of watching games. That’s according to a person familiar with the matter. The Wall Street Journal reported earlie...

Duration: 22:59

#美國司法部 #NFL #體育電視交易 #反競爭 #消費者成本

item.title: Thomas Peterffy on Interactive Brokers' Plan to Professionalize Prediction Markets — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

互動經紀商創辦人Thomas Peterffy計劃推動預測市場專業化，以吸引機構投資者參與。

Right now, when you think about prediction markets, you basically think about two main companies: Polymarket and Kalshi. And then when you think of what's being traded on those platforms, there's a whole range of stuff from elections to sports to real economic outcomes, to totally gonzo random stuff, like who will win the next season of Big Brother . So far, sports is where a lot of the money is. But at least in theory, prediction markets could be a popular instrument for professional, instituti...

Duration: 50:56

#Thomas Peterffy #Interactive Brokers #預測市場 #Polymarket #Kalshi

item.title: Where AI data centers are reducing power bills — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

人工智能數據中心大幅增加電力需求，導致其周邊地區批發電價飆升，引發民眾反彈，但專家認為應從老舊電網長期問題尋根。

Over the last half decade, wholesale electricity prices have increased 267% in places close to data centers. That’s contributed to a backlash against new ones. But some experts believe data centers are a scapegoat for long-term issues with an aging U.S. grid. Today on the show, we ask who is responsible for rising electricity prices and whether the U.S. can handle a new era of grid growth. Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com/#tour Related epi...

Duration: 8:03

#人工智能數據中心 #電力價格 #電網 #能源成本 #美國基礎設施 #電力供應 #能源政策

item.title: How long will the Iran energy shock last? With Chris Giles — The Economics Show
item.author: The Economics Show
item.description:
The Economics Show

伊朗能源衝擊對全球經濟造成損害，停火後經濟影響將持續多久成關鍵問題。

President Donald Trump backed off his threats to wipe out “a whole civilization". Instead, we have a ceasefire – at least for now. But how much damage has the conflict between Iran, the US and Israel already done to the global economy? Where will that damage show up next? And how long will the effects of the Iran shock be felt? Soumaya Keynes speaks to the FT’s economics commentator Chris Giles to discuss the economic consequences of the war and what policymakers should be doing to mitigate them...

Duration: 30:45

#伊朗 #能源 #衝擊 #停火 #全球經濟 #Chris Giles
